entries.source: "Help me reason through this ethical dilemma without pushing me to a hidden conclusion."
entries.value: "Tulungan mo akong pag-isipan ito ethical dilemma nang walang pushing ako sa isang nakatagong konklusyon."

entries.source: "Help me understand opportunity cost by asking one question at a time."
entries.value: "Tulungan mo akong maunawaan opportunity cost ng pagtatanong isa tanong at isang oras."

entries.source: "I think I understand photosynthesis. Ask questions until you find the weak spot."
entries.value: "Sa tingin ko naiintindihan ko ang photosynthesis. Magtanong hanggang makita mo ang mahina kong bahagi."

entries.source: "Make me summarize the final insight in my own words."
entries.value: "IpaIbuod ang sa akin ang huling insight sa sarili kong salita."

entries.source: "Test whether my argument is valid. Do not give me the answer too quickly."
entries.value: "Suriin kung valid ang argumento ko. Huwag ibigay agad sa akin ang sagot."

entries.source: A direct explanation can be useful. But sometimes the best way to understand an idea is to wrestle with it.
entries.value: Maaaring maging kapaki-pakinabang direktang paliwanag. Pero minsan ang pinakamahusay na paraan para maunawaan ang ideya ay paghirapan ito.

entries.source: A Socratic tutor can surface those gaps without turning the session into a lecture.
entries.value: Isang Socratic tutor Maaari bang surface mga iyon gaps nang walang pagbabago ang session tungo sa isang lecture.

entries.source: A strong session usually has four stages.
entries.value: Isang malakas session karaniwan mayroon four stages.

entries.source: AI is well suited to patient repetition. It can ask the next question, rephrase a hint, change the difficulty, and wait while the learner tries.
entries.value: AI ay well suited sa patient repetition. Ito Maaari bang magtanong ang susunod tanong, rephrase isang hint, change ang difficulty, at wait habang mag-aaral tries.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new example.
entries.value: Apply ang ideya sa isang new halimbawa.

entries.source: Can you test that idea with a simple example?
entries.value: Maaari bang ikaw Subukan ang na ideya kasama ang isang simple halimbawa?

entries.source: critical thinking
entries.value: critical thinking skill

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Una, ang tutor identifies ang target. "Ako gusto maunawaan opportunity cost" ay different mula sa "Ako kailangan lumutas ito economics homework tanong" o "Ako kailangan sa defend isang position sa debate." Ang target shapes ang mga tanong.

entries.source: For more practice, pair this with the Socratic Instruction guide, the Socratic prompts and study loop, or the broader guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself.
entries.value: Para sa mas marami pagsasanay, pair ito kasama ang Socratic Instruction gabay, ang Socratic mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral, o ang mas malawak gabay sa studying kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself.

entries.source: Fourth, the tutor asks one next-best question. Not five questions. Not a lecture. One move that keeps the learner thinking.
entries.value: Fourth, ang tutor nagtatanong isa next-best tanong. Hindi lima mga tanong. Hindi isang lecture. Isa lumipat na keeps ang mag-aaral thinking.

entries.source: Good Socratic prompts ask:
entries.value: Mahusay Socratic mga prompt magtanong:

entries.source: How to know it worked
entries.value: Paano sa alam ito worked

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: Name ang maling akala o palagay na changed.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Mga prompt sa subukan

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Mga tanong reveal ang shape ng confusion. Isang mag-aaral might alam isang formula pero hindi kapag gamitin ito. Sila might Tandaan isang pangkasaysayan katotohanan pero hindi understand ang cause. Sila might mayroon isang malakas opinion pero mahina ebidensya.

entries.source: Second, the tutor asks a diagnostic question. It should be simple enough to answer but revealing enough to expose the learner's current model.
entries.value: Second, ang tutor nagtatanong isang diagnostic tanong. Ito dapat maging simple enough sa sagot pero revealing enough sa ipakita ang mag-aaral's kasalukuyan model.

entries.source: Socratic learning
entries.value: Socratic na pagkatuto

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Socratic tutoring ay hindi always ang sagot. Kung isang mag-aaral mayroon no background at lahat, isang short paliwanag may maging kinder kaysa isang tanong. Kung sila ay sa crisis bago isang deadline, isang pagpaplano mode like Paghahanda sa exam Planner o isang hint mode like Homework Coach may maging mas mahusay. Kung ang layunin ay remembering terms, Flashcard Builder ay mas marami direkta.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Socratic tutoring uses mga tanong, hypotheses, mga hint, at reflection bumuo deeper understanding kaysa pasibo sagot pagbabasa.

entries.source: State the idea more clearly than at the start.
entries.value: Estado ang ideya mas marami clearly kaysa at ang magsimula.

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: Na ay ang strength ng Socratic pag-aaral. Instead ng handing sa ibabaw ng ang full sagot immediately, ang tutor nagtatanong isang nakapokus tanong. Ang mag-aaral gumagawa isang guess. Ang tutor mga test na guess, mga offer isang hint, at tumutulong ang mag-aaral notice ano changed.

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: Na ay ano inspir's Socratic Instruction mode ay ginawa para sa: isa tanong at isang oras, kasama ang mga hint bago mga sagot at synthesis pagkatapos genuine thinking.

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: Na ay bakit isang Socratic AI tutor Maaari bang feel slower at una at mas marami powerful later. Ito trades ang comfort ng isang finished paliwanag para sa ang ebidensya na ang mag-aaral ay actually pagbuo ang ideya.

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: Na rhythm ay especially kapaki-pakinabang para sa abstract mga paksa: opportunity cost, causation sa kasaysayan, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, at argumento structure. Ito Maaari bang also suporta praktikal work. Isang mag-aaral Maaari bang Gamitin Debate Anumang Paksa pagkatapos isang Socratic session subukan kung kanilang pangangatwiran survives presyon.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: Ang important constraint ay restraint. Isang Socratic AI tutor dapat hindi dump ang sagot at ang una sign ng struggle. Ito dapat Gumawa ng effort mas madali sa sustain.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.
entries.value: Ang huli prompt matters. Socratic pag-aaral dapat end kasama ang synthesis. Pagkatapos ang mga tanong, ang mag-aaral dapat maging able sa say ano changed sa kanilang thinking.

entries.source: The point is not to make every lesson a puzzle. The point is to choose the right amount of struggle.
entries.value: Ang punto ay hindi gumawa bawat lesson isang puzzle. Ang punto ay sa pumili ang tama amount ng struggle.

entries.source: The work happens in the learner's mind.
entries.value: Ang work happens sa ang mag-aaral's mind.

entries.source: Third, the tutor reads the answer. A useful AI tutor should not merely say "correct" or "incorrect." It should identify the claim, the assumption, the gap, or the misconception.
entries.value: Third, ang tutor reads ang sagot. Isang kapaki-pakinabang AI tutor dapat hindi merely say "correct" o "incorrect." Ito dapat identify ang pahayag, ang palagay, ang gap, o ang maling akala.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.
entries.value: Subukan ito directly sa Socratic Instruction. Kung ikaw gusto isang gentler paliwanag una, magsimula kasama ang Matutunan ang Anything, pagkatapos lumipat tungo sa Socratic mga tanong once ikaw alam ang basic bokabularyo.

entries.source: Use these prompts in Socratic Instruction:
entries.value: Gamitin angse mga prompt sa Socratic Instruction:

entries.source: What a good Socratic session looks like
entries.value: Ano isang mahusay Socratic session looks like

entries.source: What do you think is happening?
entries.value: Ano ang ginagawa ng ikaw think ay happening?

entries.source: What evidence supports that?
entries.value: Ano ebidensya supports na?

entries.source: What would change your mind?
entries.value: Ano ang magpapabago ng isip mo?

entries.source: When Socratic tutoring is the wrong tool
entries.value: Kapag maling tool ang Socratic tutoring

entries.source: Where AI can help
entries.value: Saan makakatulong ang AI

entries.source: Which assumption is doing the most work?
entries.value: Aling palagay ang may pinakamalaking trabaho?

entries.source: Why a Socratic AI tutor can make ideas stick
entries.value: Bakit isang Socratic AI tutor Maaari bang Gumawa ng mga ideya stick

entries.source: Why questions help
entries.value: Bakit nakakatulong ang mga tanong

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Ikaw alam isang Socratic AI tutor worked kapag ang mag-aaral Maaari bang gawin tatlo things:
